_doc: Workflow template registry. Each template at .harness/workflows/templates/<id>.json defines an ordered `stages` list. The active selection for a project lives at .harness/state/workflow-template.json. Three ABSTRACT SLOTS (VERIFY-GATE / HUMAN-REVIEW / WATCH) are bound by each template to a type-appropriate concrete stage; the dashboard and skills read the bound stage. Lanes (full / stability-fix / trivial) are an orthogonal intensity axis applied WITHIN any template.

stage_schema.title: human display name
stage_schema.skill: skill name to invoke, or null for guidance/manual stages
stage_schema.slot: abstract slot this stage binds (VERIFY-GATE|HUMAN-REVIEW|WATCH), or null
stage_schema.lanes: lanes this stage runs in; omit = all lanes. Spec stages are typically ["full"]
stage_schema.optional_if: human-readable condition under which this stage is skipped, or null

lanes.full: New feature / intent change / schema change / new dependency — all stages
lanes.stability-fix: Bug fix, intent unchanged — skip spec stages (lanes:[full]); failing test mandatory
lanes.trivial: <20 LOC, no new feature/schema/dependency — skip spec stages; auditor Quick mode

templates.title: Full-stack service
templates.summary: Backend + DB web app. The original 9-stage pipeline.
detect: server/api routes + a DB driver/ORM (prisma, drizzle, sqlalchemy, mongoose)
supabase/ or server/ or api/ dirs
package.json/requirements with both web + db deps

templates.title: Frontend / SPA / marketing site
templates.summary: Design-heavy, visual QA, usually no DB.
detect: react/vue/svelte + vite/next static, no server/db deps

templates.title: Mobile app (iOS/Android)
templates.summary: Device testing, store review, staged rollout.

templates.title: Library / CLI / SDK
templates.summary: API-first, semver, docs, publish — no UI.
detect: setup.py / pyproject with no app entrypoint

templates.title: Content / writing / docs
templates.summary: Articles & docs (not code): structure, edit, fact-check.
detect: content/ or posts/ or docs/ as the primary tree
